ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been accessed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type (e.g., Knowledge Base, Textbook) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, archived, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Knowledge Base, Guide) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document type (e.g., Academic, Administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document for which feedback is provided */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* User's feedback text */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document that this version corresponds to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded this version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Brief description of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
